parents.subject: LU-18110 doc: lctl multiple NIDs specification not clear

commit.subject: LU-18139 gss: use lookup_user_key() when available
commit.message:
LU-18139 gss: use lookup_user_key() when available

When lookup_user_key() is available, use the kernel API rather than
directly accessing the desired keyring via the current process's
credentials.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2
Test-Parameters: kerberos=true testlist=sanity-krb5
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I6cd47354c06e69f818aa050f78c65f19e80e5c7f
